video:video.video:description: Unilateral work. Full stretch at bottom.

video:video.video:description: Hands narrow. Tricep emphasis.

video:video.video:description: Wake up the glutes, hip flexors and leg muscles with targeted activation drills before lower body workouts.

video:video.video:title: Upper Body Warm-Up
video:video.video:description: Activate shoulders, chest and arms before upper body workouts with this targeted warm-up sequence.

video:video.video:title: Total Body Mobility Flow
video:video.video:description: A flowing mobility sequence that moves every joint through its full range â€” great for active recovery days.

video:video.video:title: Adductor & Groin Stretch
video:video.video:description: Open up the inner thighs and groin â€” vital for leg day recovery and squat depth.

video:video.video:title: Core Mobility & Stretch
video:video.video:description: Target your spine and core with deep mobility movements that improve posture and reduce lower back tension.

video:video.video:title: Core Activation Warm-Up
video:video.video:description: Activate your core and stabilizer muscles before any workout to improve performance and protect your spine.

video:video.video:title: Quad & Hip Flexor Stretch
video:video.video:description: Lengthen tight quads and hip flexors â€” crucial for athletes who sit for long periods.

video:video.video:title: Calf & Achilles Stretch
video:video.video:description: Stretch the calves and Achilles tendon to prevent tightness and improve lower leg mobility.

video:video.video:title: Adductor & Groin Stretch
video:video.video:description: Open up the inner thighs and groin â€” vital for leg day recovery and squat depth.

video:video.video:title: Cardio Activation Warm-Up
video:video.video:description: Raise your heart rate and body temperature with this light cardio warm-up before high intensity training.

video:video.video:title: Calf & Achilles Stretch
video:video.video:description: Stretch the calves and Achilles tendon to prevent tightness and improve lower leg mobility.

video:video.video:title: Active Recovery Flow
video:video.video:description: A gentle active recovery stretch routine to keep blood flowing and muscles supple on rest days.

video:video.video:title: Spinal Decompression Stretch
video:video.video:description: Decompress the spine with gentle traction movements to relieve pressure after heavy compound lifts.

video:video.video:title: Full Body Dynamic Warm-Up
video:video.video:description: Get your whole body moving with this dynamic warm-up â€” perfect before any home workout session.

video:video.video:title: Dynamic Stretching
video:video.video:description: Full body warmup before workout.

video:video.video:title: Wrist & Forearm Flexibility
video:video.video:description: Improve wrist mobility and forearm flexibility â€” essential for bench press and overhead movements.

video:video.video:title: Joint Mobility Routine
video:video.video:description: Ankles, hips, shoulders, wrists.

video:video.video:title: Total Body Mobility Flow
video:video.video:description: Deeply stretch hamstrings, glutes, hip flexors and calves to relieve tightness and improve leg mobility.

video:video.video:title: Core Mobility & Stretch
video:video.video:description: Target your spine and core with deep mobility movements that improve posture and reduce lower back tension.

video:video.video:title: Dynamic Flow Stretching
video:video.video:description: A flowing full-body stretch sequence that warms up joints and increases range of motion before heavy lifting.

video:video.video:title: Hip & Leg Activation
video:video.video:description: Wake up the glutes, hip flexors and leg muscles with targeted activation drills before lower body workouts.

video:video.video:title: Squat Prep Warmup
video:video.video:description: Hip and ankle mobility for squats.

video:video.video:title: Calf & Achilles Stretch
video:video.video:description: Stretch the calves and Achilles tendon to prevent tightness and improve lower leg mobility.

video:video.video:title: Full Body Flexibility Routine
video:video.video:description: A complete head-to-toe flexibility session to improve overall range of motion and movement quality.

video:video.video:title: Thoracic Spine Mobility
video:video.video:description: Improve thoracic spine rotation and extension for a healthier, more mobile upper back.

video:video.video:title: Total Body Mobility Flow
video:video.video:description: Counter the effects of prolonged sitting with targeted stretches for the neck, back, hips and shoulders.

video:video.video:title: Rope Pushdown
video:video.video:description: Achieve maximum tricep peak contraction with the rope pushdown and thumbs-down finish position.

video:video.video:title: Lat Pulldowns
video:video.video:description: Drive elbows down. Wide grip.

video:video.video:title: Skull Crushers (EZ Bar)
video:video.video:description: Build tricep mass and strength with skull crushers â€” a classic mass builder for the tricep long head.

video:video.video:title: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
video:video.video:description: Target your hamstrings and glutes with this essential hip hinge movement for posterior chain strength.

video:video.video:title: Pec Deck Machine
video:video.video:description: Isolate chest, squeeze at peak contraction.

video:video.video:title: Tricep Finisher â€” Burnout Set
video:video.video:description: End your arm day with a high-rep tricep burnout to fully exhaust the muscle for maximum growth stimulus.

video:video.video:title: Close-Grip Bench Press
video:video.video:description: Overload the triceps with the close-grip bench press â€” the best compound movement for triceps mass.

video:video.video:title: Shoulder Stability & Activation
video:video.video:description: Activation drills and stability exercises to prepare your shoulders and prevent injury before heavy pressing.

video:video.video:title: Kickbacks â€” Tricep Isolation
video:video.video:description: Fully contract the tricep at the top of each rep with dumbbell kickbacks for shape and definition.

video:video.video:title: Shoulder Width Superset
video:video.video:description: Superset lateral raises with overhead press for maximum side delt pump and width gains.

video:video.video:title: Upright Row
video:video.video:description: Build upper traps and lateral delts together with this compound pulling movement.

video:video.video:title: Decline Bench Press
video:video.video:description: Target lower chest fibers.

video:video.video:title: Cable Flyes
video:video.video:description: Constant tension. Squeeze at the center.

video:video.video:title: Overhead Tricep Extension
video:video.video:description: Stretch and strengthen the long head of the tricep with overhead extensions for complete arm development.

video:video.video:title: DB Bent-Over Reverse Fly
video:video.video:description: Target rear delts and upper back simultaneously for improved shoulder balance and aesthetics.

video:video.video:title: Decline Bench Press
video:video.video:description: Target lower chest fibers.

video:video.video:title: Concentration Curls
video:video.video:description: Arm braced. Pure isolation.

video:video.video:title: Single-Arm Cable Lateral
video:video.video:description: Single-arm cable lateral raises for improved muscle symmetry and unilateral side delt development.

video:video.video:title: Chest Press Machine
video:video.video:description: Good isolation at end of workout.

video:video.video:title: Hammer Curls
video:video.video:description: Neutral grip targets brachialis.

video:video.video:title: Seated Dumbbell Lateral Raise
video:video.video:description: Eliminate body momentum with seated lateral raises for strict side delt isolation and growth.

video:video.video:title: Dumbbell Pullover
video:video.video:description: Expands ribcage, targets serratus.

video:video.video:title: Barbell Back Squat
video:video.video:description: The king of all leg exercises â€” build quad, hamstring and glute mass with the classic barbell back squat.

video:video.video:title: Incline Dumbbell Press
video:video.video:description: Target upper pecs. 30-45 degree incline.

video:video.video:title: Tricep Finisher â€” Burnout Set
video:video.video:description: End your arm day with a high-rep tricep burnout to fully exhaust the muscle for maximum growth stimulus.

video:video.video:title: Rope Pushdown
video:video.video:description: Achieve maximum tricep peak contraction with the rope pushdown and thumbs-down finish position.

video:video.video:title: Dumbbell Pullover
video:video.video:description: Expands ribcage, targets serratus.

video:video.video:title: Incline Dumbbell Press
video:video.video:description: Target upper pecs. 30-45 degree incline.

video:video.video:description: Stretch and strengthen the long head of the tricep with overhead extensions for complete arm development.

video:video.video:description: Good isolation at end of workout.

video:video.video:description: Eliminate body momentum with seated lateral raises for strict side delt isolation and growth.

video:video.video:description: Release tension in the glutes and piriformis muscle to reduce hip tightness and sciatic pain.

video:video.video:title: Shoulder Capsule Stretch
video:video.video:description: Target the shoulder capsule and rotator cuff with deep stretches for injury prevention.

video:video.video:title: Shoulder Finisher â€” Drop Set
video:video.video:description: Finish your shoulder workout with a brutal drop set of lateral raises for maximum muscle fatigue and growth.

video:video.video:title: Arnold Press
video:video.video:description: Use this classic rotational press to hit all three heads of the deltoid in one powerful movement.

video:video.video:title: Cable Flyes
video:video.video:description: Constant tension. Squeeze at the center.

video:video.video:title: Barbell Back Squat
video:video.video:description: The king of all leg exercises â€” build quad, hamstring and glute mass with the classic barbell back squat.

video:video.video:title: Cable Front Raise
video:video.video:description: Constant tension cable front raise to fully activate the anterior deltoid for size and strength.

video:video.video:title: Cable Lateral Raise
video:video.video:description: Achieve constant tension on the side delts throughout the full range of motion with cable lateral raises.

video:video.video:title: Cable Lateral Raise
video:video.video:description: Achieve constant tension on the side delts throughout the full range of motion with cable lateral raises.

video:video.video:title: Plate Front Raise
video:video.video:description: Add variety to front delt training with plate front raises for enhanced mind-muscle connection.

video:video.video:title: Z-Press â€” Core & Shoulder Stability
video:video.video:description: Press from a seated floor position to challenge core stability and strict shoulder strength.

video:video.video:title: Plate Front Raise
video:video.video:description: Add variety to front delt training with plate front raises for enhanced mind-muscle connection.

video:video.video:title: Rear Delt Machine Fly
video:video.video:description: Use the fly machine reversed to isolate rear deltoids with strict form and full range of motion.

video:video.video:title: Standing Calf Raises
video:video.video:description: Build thick and defined calves with heavy standing calf raises for complete lower leg development.

video:video.video:title: Arnold Press
video:video.video:description: Use this classic rotational press to hit all three heads of the deltoid in one powerful movement.

video:video.video:title: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
video:video.video:description: Target your hamstrings and glutes with this essential hip hinge movement for posterior chain strength.

video:video.video:title: Push Press â€” Explosive Shoulder Power
video:video.video:description: Build explosive shoulder power and strength with the push press using leg drive to overload the delts.

video:video.video:title: Upright Row
video:video.video:description: Build upper traps and lateral delts together with this compound pulling movement.

video:video.video:title: Push Press â€” Explosive Shoulder Power
video:video.video:description: Build explosive shoulder power and strength with the push press using leg drive to overload the delts.

video:video.video:title: Bent Over Barbell Rows
video:video.video:description: Pull to lower stomach. Squeeze lats.

video:video.video:title: Single Arm DB Row
video:video.video:description: Unilateral work. Full stretch at bottom.

video:video.video:title: Band Pull-Aparts
video:video.video:description: Use resistance bands to activate and strengthen rear delts and rotator cuff muscles efficiently.

video:video.video:title: Face Pulls â€” Rear Delt & Rotator Cuff
video:video.video:description: Strengthen rear delts and rotator cuff with face pulls â€” essential for shoulder health and injury prevention.

video:video.video:title: Chest Press Machine
video:video.video:description: Good isolation at end of workout.

video:video.video:title: Landmine Press
video:video.video:description: Build shoulder strength and stability with the landmine press â€” great for shoulder-friendly pressing.

video:video.video:title: Bent-Over Rear Delt Fly
video:video.video:description: Hit the often-neglected rear deltoids for balanced shoulders and improved posture.

video:video.video:title: Shoulder Finisher â€” Drop Set
video:video.video:description: Finish your shoulder workout with a brutal drop set of lateral raises for maximum muscle fatigue and growth.

video:video.video:title: Landmine Press
video:video.video:description: Build shoulder strength and stability with the landmine press â€” great for shoulder-friendly pressing.

video:video.video:title: Push Press â€” Explosive Shoulder Power
video:video.video:description: Build explosive shoulder power and strength with the push press using leg drive to overload the delts.

video:video.video:title: Lateral Raises â€” Side Delts
video:video.video:description: Isolate the lateral deltoid head to create wide, capped shoulders with controlled lateral raises.

video:video.video:title: T-Bar Rows
video:video.video:description: Mid-back thickness builder.

video:video.video:title: Cable Y-Raise â€” Lower Trap & Rear Delt
video:video.video:description: Strengthen lower traps and rear delts with the Y-raise for improved scapular health and posture.

video:video.video:title: Bent-Over Rear Delt Fly
video:video.video:description: Hit the often-neglected rear deltoids for balanced shoulders and improved posture.

video:video.video:title: Chest Press Machine
video:video.video:description: Good isolation at end of workout.

video:video.video:description: Press from a seated floor position to challenge core stability and strict shoulder strength.

video:video.video:description: Lengthen tight quads and hip flexors â€” crucial for athletes who sit for long periods.
